# Sash.Ai Forge — Full content for LLM crawlers

> Sash.Ai Forge turns an idea into a launched AI startup — product, company, brand, and investor intros — in weeks, not quarters.

## Positioning

Sash.Ai Forge is a startup launchpad for non-technical founders who want to move at startup speed.

The three pillars:
1. Speed — weeks, not quarters.
2. Completeness — product + company + brand + investors, under one roof.
3. Caliber — senior CTO-led, AI-native products shipped. Speed without compromise.

We are not a Fractional CTO service. We are not an agency. We are a startup launchpad for non-technical founders.

## Hero

### Launch your AI startup at startup speed.

Come with an idea. In weeks, walk out with a live AI product, a registered company, a brand, and intros to investors and customers. Senior CTO-led. AI-native by design. Built for founders who don't have years to wait.

- Senior AI-native CTO included
- Products shipped, not demos
- Built for founder runway — milestone-based, no retainers

## The 5-step journey

Most founders come to us at step 1. Some come at step 3. Some already have a product and need help with step 5. You can start anywhere — each step stands alone.

1. **Idea → validated concept (Week 1)** — We pressure-test your idea, map the AI architecture, and write the spec. You leave the week with clarity, not a pitch deck.
2. **AI product built & live (Weeks 2–6)** — We build and ship a production-grade AI product. Real users can use it. Investors can touch it. Not a demo.
3. **Company registered, brand live (Weeks 2–4, in parallel)** — Company registration, trademark, domain, logo, site, socials. Your startup becomes a real entity while the product ships.
4. **Investor & customer intros (Week 6 onward)** — We put you in rooms with investors and design partners from our network. You bring the pitch — we bring the table.
5. **Ongoing tech + growth partner (As long as you need)** — Post-launch, we stay on as your tech team — feature shipping, infra, hiring, or gradually handing off to your in-house team.

Modular on purpose. Start from idea, or plug us in mid-journey.

## The complete package

You get a launched startup. Not a deliverable.

Most agencies hand you a product and say good luck. We hand you a company. Product, legal, brand, hiring pipeline, investor intros — delivered as one orchestrated launch, because running between five vendors is how founders lose six months they don't have.

- **Product** — Production-grade AI app, live, usable, investor-ready.
- **Company** — Registration, trademark, compliance, handled end-to-end.
- **Brand** — Logo, identity, site, socials — designed to stand out from day one.
- **Network** — Intros to investors, design partners, hiring channels.

## How we show up (partnership, not vendor)

We forge this with you. We don't just execute instructions.

Most agencies wait for a brief and ship what's on it. We think like co-founders — pushing back on weak ideas, proposing better ones, owning the outcome with you. You'll know exactly what's happening, when, and what it costs, every step of the way.

- **Co-founder mindset** — We challenge assumptions, sharpen the idea, and flag the risks you can't see yet. Partnership, not pass-through.
- **Predictable budget** — Fixed-scope milestones with fixed prices. No hourly meters. No scope creep invoices. You always know the next number before we ship.
- **Skin in the game** — For the right founders we'll take part of our fee in equity. We win when you win — not when the retainer renews.

## Built for founder runway

Bootstrapped? We respect your runway.

We've shipped products with first-time founders who were counting months of runway. Our engagements are structured for that reality — predictable, milestone-based, no surprise invoices — without cutting corners on the work.

- **Milestone-based, not monthly** — You pay for outcomes shipped, not hours logged. Every milestone is a defined deliverable with a defined price. If we don't ship, you don't pay for the next one.
- **Equity-flexible for the right founders** — For founders with strong conviction and tight cash, we'll discuss cash + equity blends on a case-by-case basis. Selective, not standard.
- **You own 100% of the IP** — Your code, your company, your product. No vendor lock-in. No revenue share. No strings.

## Why not X? (honest comparison)

| Dimension | Tech co-founder | Agency | DIY no-code | Sash.Ai Forge |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Time to launch | 6–12 mo to find, 6–12 to build | 6–12 mo, often slips | 1–3 mo to no-code ceiling | **6 weeks to live product** |
| Your equity | 30–50% gone | 100% kept | 100% kept | **100% kept** |
| Company setup | You handle it | You handle it | You handle it | **Included** |
| Investor access | None | None | None | **Included** |
| AI depth | Depends on who you find | Rarely AI-native | Limited to no-code | **AI-native by design** |
| Risk if they leave | Catastrophic — they own half | Moderate — vendor lock-in | Low — but product is fragile | **Low — IP is yours** |
| Budget model | Equity opportunity cost | Monthly retainer | Tool subscriptions | **Milestone-based, predictable** |

The real competition isn't each other — it's the calendar. Every month you spend deciding is a month a competitor ships.

## The 45-day plan

- **Week 1 — Foundation**: Idea pressure-test · AI architecture spec · Product scope locked · Company registration filed
- **Weeks 2–3 — Core build**: Backend, AI pipelines, frontend · Brand + logo delivered · Domain + site live
- **Weeks 4–5 — Integration**: Full product assembly · AI model fine-tuning · QA · Trademark filed
- **Week 6 — Launch**: Production deploy · Soft launch to first users · Investor deck + intros begin
- **Ongoing**: Weekly shipping cadence · Growth + hiring support · Your CTO stays embedded

## Team

Senior caliber. No junior hand-offs.

- **Biddappa Muthappa** — CEO, Co-founder — "I'll be in your investor meetings."
- **Shabareesh Raj** — Chief AI Officer, Co-founder — "I architect your AI system. I don't delegate it."
- **Sameer Dhanranjani** — Strategic Advisor — "I've built this playbook before. I know where the traps are."

## Pricing

Transparent ranges. No surprises.

Every engagement is quoted after the free idea review. Milestone-based, fixed-price per deliverable — so your budget stays predictable from week one.

- **Idea → MVP launch** — Starts from — let's talk. Full 45-day launch: product + company + brand + first intros.
- **Product → Scale** — Starts from — let's talk. Ongoing engineering + growth partnership for founders with an MVP.
- **Plug-in CTO** — Starts from — let's talk. Senior AI leadership for founders who already have a team.

Bootstrapped? We discuss cash + equity blends for the right founders. Ask us in the idea review.

## FAQ

**Q: I'm bootstrapped. Can we still work together?**
Yes, if the idea is strong. We've structured engagements with cash + equity blends for founders with real conviction and tight cash. The free idea review is where we figure out the right model for you.

**Q: Do I need to know how to code?**
No. The entire offer is built for non-technical founders. You bring domain insight and decision-making — we bring the technical build, architecture, and team.

**Q: How is this different from hiring an agency?**
Agencies ship a deliverable and leave. We ship a company — product, legal, brand, and investor intros — and stay on as long as you need. And unlike an agency, we think like co-founders: we challenge the idea, propose better versions, and own the outcome with you.

**Q: What AI work do you actually do?**
Production AI systems: LLM-based applications, agentic pipelines, retrieval systems, fine-tuning, voice AI, infrastructure, and cost-optimized deployment. AI-native, not AI-sprinkled.

**Q: Who owns the code and IP?**
You. 100%. From day one. We don't hold IP, we don't white-label, and we don't lock you into retainers to maintain code we wrote.

**Q: What if I already have an MVP?**
Start at step 2 or 3 of the journey. We scale what you have, fix what's fragile, and support your investor and customer conversations. You don't restart — you plug us in.

**Q: How do investor intros actually work?**
We open our network to founders we're engaged with. You pitch; we introduce. We're selective about who we put in front of our investor and customer contacts — our reputation is on the line.

**Q: What does a 45-day engagement actually cost?**
Every engagement is quoted after the free idea review. We don't publish fixed prices because no two launches are identical — but we won't surprise you either. Each milestone is priced up front, so you always see the next number before we ship it.

**Q: What happens after 45 days?**
Most founders continue with us as an ongoing tech partner while they hire their own team. Some hand off entirely. The engagement is month-to-month — no long contracts.

**Q: How selective are you?**
We take on founders we believe can build something real. The idea review is a two-way qualification: you're evaluating us, we're evaluating the fit. Not every founder gets an engagement offer.
